title: Lead SEO Specialist at FabAlley South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at FabAlley South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley South Asia Partners:
FabAlley South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley South Asia Partners!
